violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. At the time of inspection, there was no certified food service manager. Manager stated that she was going next week for training.

Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface was not disassembled for proper cleaning. Observing sitting water inside of the orange juice machine when opening the front door.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
